title: LegisCode
description: An intelligent search portal that indexes legal articles and guidelines on digital rights, making compliance simple for software developers.

title: CricStats Dashboard
description: An interactive data analytics system visualizing historical bowler economy rates, run-chase probabilities, and team dynamics during match points.

title: Civix Core
description: A secure, glassmorphic civic engagement portal where community members can participate in direct local policy polls and debate legislative proposals.

title: OmniTask Board
description: A full-stack collaborative project management utility featuring real-time kanban state synchronization, analytical reports, and dark themes.
